pr.title: Mark LobeChat template as deprecated, direct users to Lobe Hub successor
pr.body:
LobeChat is no longer actively maintained. This PR marks the template as deprecated and directs users toward Lobe Hub, the official successor.

## Changes

- **Main README.md**: Added deprecation badge (`⚠️ DEPRECATED`) and notice to LobeChat Database listing, explaining LobeChat is no longer maintained and recommending Lobe Hub for new deployments
- **Template README.md**: Added prominent deprecation header with linked reference to [Lobe Hub](https://hub.lobechat.com/), highlighting improved features and active maintenance as reasons to migrate

Users accessing either the main listing or template documentation now receive clear, consistent messaging about the deprecation status and migration path.
pr.author: Copilot
